title: RFQ 26-018 - Design-Build Services for the LBT1 Electrification Infrastructure Project
summary: Design-build services for Long Beach Transit's LBT1 electrification infrastructure project. Scope includes planning and delivery of zero-emission transit infrastructure.

title: RFQI 25-001 - AE Services for LBT1 Electrification
summary: Architect and engineering services for Long Beach Transit's LBT1 electrification project. Supports design and implementation of zero-emission transit infrastructure.

title: Otay Mesa Transit Planning Study
summary: Transit planning study for the Otay Mesa area. This is a planning and feasibility study for transit infrastructure.

title: Zero Emission Multiple Unit Rail Vehicles
summary: Procurement of zero emission multiple unit rail vehicles for transit service expansion. RFP for acquisition of ZEV rail rolling stock to support sustainable transit operations.

title: Modern Computer-Aided Dispatch (CAD) Platform with Integrated Positive Train Control (PTC)
summary: Procurement of modern CAD platform with integrated PTC and additional capabilities for transit operations. Technology system to enhance dispatch and train control operations.

title: Design-Build for Electric Bus Charging Station Upgrades
summary: Design-build project for upgrades to electric bus charging infrastructure. This procurement supports zero emission vehicle transition for transit operations.

title: On Call Transit Planning & Staffing Support
summary: On-call professional services for transit planning and staffing support. Request for Proposal for ongoing consulting services.

title: Microgrid Strategic Energy Plan - Phase I - A&E Design Only
summary: Architecture and engineering design services for Phase I of a microgrid strategic energy planning initiative. Design-focused professional services.

title: PROGRAM PROJECT MANAGEMENT AND TECHNICAL SERVICES IN SUPPORT OF THE MAJOR PROJECTS PROGRAM
summary: Program and project management services for San Bernardino CTA's Major Projects Program. Includes technical support for program delivery and oversight.

title: ON-CALL ENVIRONMENTAL SERVICES
summary: On-call environmental services for San Bernardino CTA projects. Supports compliance and environmental assessment needs.

title: GRANT WRITING AND GRANT MANAGEMENT SERVICES
summary: Grant writing and grant management services for San Bernardino CTA. Supports funding acquisition and grant administration.

title: LA28 - Parking Advisory and Acquisition Consulting Services
summary: Advisory and consulting services for parking management and acquisition related to the Los Angeles 2028 Olympic Games. Includes parking strategy planning and procurement support.

title: On-Call Transit Planning Services
summary: On-call transit planning services for AC Transit. Provides professional planning support for transit projects and operations.

title: Project Management, Community Outreach, and Volunteer Recruitment for Ecological
summary: Project management services including community outreach and volunteer recruitment for an ecological project. Includes project coordination and stakeholder engagement.

title: Work Order Construction Management Services for Parks Division
summary: Construction management services for parks division projects. Includes owner's representative and construction oversight services.

title: Construction Management Services for the White Center Ponds Retrofit Project
summary: Construction management services for the White Center Ponds Retrofit Project. Includes project oversight and construction administration.

title: Comprehensive Infrastructure Assessment of Facilities, Equipment, & Systems
summary: Comprehensive assessment and evaluation of facilities, equipment, and building systems infrastructure. Includes condition evaluation and recommendations.

title: Enterprise Asset Management (EAMS) Business Case & Return on Investment Analysis
summary: Development of business case and ROI analysis for enterprise asset management system implementation. Includes evaluation of EAMS solutions and their financial impact on transit operations.

title: Organizational Development & Design and Consulting Services
summary: Sound Transit seeking organizational development and design consulting services. Request for proposals focused on organizational structure and development initiatives.

title: Inner Katy BRT – Civil (CBD Bypass)
summary: Civil construction project for Inner Katy Bus Rapid Transit corridor with CBD bypass component. Procurement method to be determined.

title: Kashmere Bus Operating Facility Petroleum Storage Tank Replacement
summary: Replacement of petroleum storage tank at Kashmere Bus Operating Facility. Advance Procurement Notice for longer-term planning purposes.

title: CMAR Ashmont and Mattapan Infrastructure Upgrades
summary: Construction manager at-risk services for infrastructure upgrades at Ashmont and Mattapan stations in Boston. Scope includes managing trade contractors and construction activities for transit station improvements.

title: Mystic Junction, Chestnut St and Washington St Environmental Remediation
summary: Design and construction services for environmental remediation at Mystic Junction site in Somerville/Boston. Project involves assessment and remediation of contaminated soil and groundwater conditions.

title: Bus Operating Facility IT Rehab
summary: Information technology rehabilitation and upgrades at Houston Metro bus operating facility. Procurement via DIR (Texas Department of Information Resources).

title: Leadership Development Program
summary: RFP for leadership development and training program services for Houston Metro staff and management.

title: Management Consulting
summary: RFP soliciting management consulting firms to provide as-needed advisory and consulting services in corporate strategy, business process optimization, and transportation operations strategy. Five-year agreements with multiple firms as a pool to serve the MTA on an as-needed basis.

title: Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) Improvement Program - Technical and Management Consulting Services
summary: RFP for technical and management consulting services supporting the MTA's Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) Program. Multi-firm retainer contract with seven-year term and three one-year options; work assignments issued through mini-RFP process. Total estimated value $135 million.

title: Transit Facilities Maintenance and Signposting Services
summary: LADOT seeks proposals to manage, maintain, and landscape twelve facilities including five Metrolink stations, two park-and-ride lots, one passenger transit hub, and one vacant lot. Work includes sign management and maintenance. Five-year contract expected to extend through 2027 Super Bowl and 2028 Olympic Games.

title: Rapid Response Contractors for LIRR State of Good Repair Work
summary: LIRR is seeking rapid response contractors to support state of good repair maintenance and repair work across the railroad system. This is an on-call/as-needed contract for ongoing operational maintenance activities.
agency: NY MTA — Long Island Rail Road

title: Continuous Welded Rail (CWR) Hauling Train
summary: LIRR is soliciting a Request for Expression of Interest (RFEI) for continuous welded rail hauling train services to support railroad infrastructure maintenance and replacement activities.
agency: NY MTA — Long Island Rail Road
